body:
## What  
Configure routing using createBrowserRouter and add PrivateRoute for protected pages.

## 内容  
使用 createBrowserRouter 配置前端路由，并为受保护页面添加 PrivateRoute 鉴权逻辑。

## Included  
- Added router structure with 9 routes  
- Implemented PrivateRoute using localStorage token check  
- Created page skeletons  
- Added basic Navbar navigation  

## 包含内容  
- 配置了 9 个页面路由  
- 实现基于 localStorage 的 PrivateRoute 鉴权  
- 创建页面骨架组件  
- 添加基础导航栏  

## Verification  
- All routes render correctly  
- Protected routes redirect to /login when no token  
- Access works when token exists  

## 验证  
- 所有路由可以正常跳转  
- 未登录访问受保护页面会跳转到 /login  
- 设置 token 后可以正常访问  

## Notes  
No UI styling included. Current auth logic is temporary and will be replaced in later PR.

## 备注  
PR 不包含 UI 样式，当前鉴权逻辑为临时方案，后续 PR 会替换为全局状态管理。

reviews.body:
PrivateRoute reads localStorage.getItem('token') directly instead of using the getToken() helper in tokenUtils.js. Since tokenUtils.js is in the same PR, please use getToken() here to keep the token key centralised. Otherwise the key 'token' is hardcoded in two places — if it ever changes, it's easy to miss one.
tokenUtils.js key name comment is slightly misleading — it says "PrivateRoute (PR 2) currently reads localStorage directly… will be replaced in PR 4", but both files are in the same PR (#53). Minor docs issue, safe to fix in a follow-up.
Overall the structure is clean and the placeholder pages are well organised. Approach is fine given it will be replaced with authStore later.

title: feat: configure routing and auth guard
